runTitle: Vercel Production Playwright MCP - Recent Two-Week Improvements Applied Recheck (v8.12.91)
coveredSurfaces: Vercel MCP project metadata reports latest production deployment dpl_g7Zfcag1nht2qUvsEPYJRjQoUGrq as READY
production alias https://openmanager-ai.vercel.app /api/version returns v8.12.91, commit 3aa2f7bcba4532b79aa39680aad3af430fc775c2, GitLab pipeline 2578083591
landing page renders OpenManager AI v8.12.91 and example questions as static list items, not clickable fake prompt buttons
/login renders OAuth buttons, disabled empty email submit, privacy link, guest CTA, and v8.12.91 copy
guest PIN dialog opens from guest CTA; PIN entry enables Login and authenticates through POST /api/auth/guest-login 200
authenticated landing state exposes guest profile and Dashboard Open action
/dashboard loads with 18-server OTel snapshot, 17 online, 1 warning, 0 risk, 0 offline, slot 75/143, resource summary, top-5 resource alerts, and server cards
AI sidebar opens from dashboard header and shows AI Chat, automatic report, anomaly tabs, AI Engine Ready button, starter cards, and dashboard-consistent 18-server summary
AI question input accepts text and enables the message submit button without submitting a live LLM request
AI sidebar close leaves no visible dialog; remaining hidden dialog nodes have display:none and zero layout size
browser console warning/error count remained 0 during the Playwright MCP walkthrough
critical document/fetch/xhr requests returned 200: csrf-token, guest-login, ai wake-up, /api/system, soft AI health, monitoring report, OTel hourly data, and timeseries data
Vercel usage check after QA remains normal: effective 1.9358 USD, billed 0.0000 USD for the current billing period
skippedSurfaces: Live AI conversation generation was skipped to preserve provider quota because QA-20260605-0653 already recorded the standard 5-question conversational AI QA pass for the recent two-week improvement set
OAuth provider login was skipped because guest PIN auth covers the release-facing access path for this targeted production recheck
Mobile viewport regression was skipped because this run focused on desktop Vercel application of recent changes and recent local/production UI wiring QA already covered the changed desktop path
Cloud Run admin observability endpoints were skipped because this recheck targeted Vercel frontend deployment/application state, not Cloud Run admin monitoring behavior

Vercel Speed Insights vitals POSTs showed transient ERR_ABORTED entries followed by successful 200 vitals posts; treated as non-blocking telemetry noise because core product/API requests were successful

expertAssessments.rationale: Direct Playwright MCP covered the changed Vercel UI/auth/dashboard/AI-sidebar surfaces with console and network inspection.
Vercel MCP and /api/version agree on the latest production deployment, commit, and release pipeline; usage remains billed 0.0000 USD.
This run confirms AI sidebar wiring and relies on QA-20260605-0653 for the already-passed live standard 5-question conversational AI assessment, avoiding redundant provider spend.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period 2026-06-01T07:00:00.000Z..2026-06-05T03:25:47.314Z; effective 1.9358 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 1827. No unexpected billed usage observed after production QA.

artifacts.label: Production dashboard recent improvements recheck
artifacts.note: Captured by direct Playwright MCP after dashboard and AI sidebar UI checks.

completedImprovements.title: Recent two-week improvements confirmed applied on Vercel production v8.12.91
completedImprovements.note: Vercel deployment metadata, /api/version, landing/login guest flow, dashboard OTel snapshot, AI sidebar wiring, console cleanliness, critical network requests, and Vercel usage all passed.

notes: Recent two-week Git history spans v8.12.1 through v8.12.91 and primarily covers AI routing/evidence paths, dashboard UI/UX, CI/deploy stability, off-domain guardrails, and frontend UI wiring polish.
This run did not submit a live AI prompt. The live conversational AI standard 5-question result is covered by QA-20260605-0653 and was judged PASS for the recent two-week improvement set.

Network observation: several Vercel Speed Insights vitals POSTs were aborted, then later vitals POSTs returned 200. Product-critical requests all returned 200, so this is recorded as non-blocking telemetry noise.
